categories.title: Recent Pull Requests in the elizaOS/eliza Repository

content.text:
Several pull requests have been submitted to the elizaOS/eliza repository, focusing on improvements to various aspects of the codebase:

1. PR #4332 by 0xbbjoker aims to improve schema type safety, categorized as a chore task.

2. PR #4190 by Imsharad adds 100% instrumentation coverage for the Twitter plugin, marked as a feature enhancement.

3. PR #4330 by UD1sto introduces Docker improvements, though specific details about these improvements are not provided in the source.

4. PR #4328 by tcm390 fixes a GUI issue by synchronizing environment states with updated characterValue properties.

Several bugs have been fixed in the Eliza project:

1. Plugin command normalization across v1 and v2 implementations (PR #4327)

2. Prevention of repetitive agent replies, improving conversation quality (PR #4331)

3. Fixed OpenAI speech-to-text functionality (PR #4329)

4. GUI improvement to synchronize environment states with updated characterValue properties (PR #4328)

Current cryptocurrency prices:

- WETH (Wrapped Ethereum) is trading at $1,586.72
- SOL (Solana) is trading at $137.83

Between April 21-22, 2025, the elizaos/eliza repository saw moderate activity with 6 new pull requests, of which 4 were successfully merged. There were no new issues reported during this period. The repository had 6 active contributors working on it during these two days.
sources: text: From 2025-04-21 to 2025-04-22, elizaos/eliza had 6 new PRs (4 merged), 0 new issues, and 6 active contributors.
